title: Médecin ouvre et valide une consultation, patient reçoit Zora
source_extraction: verifie Cascade, tests/e2e/s05-consultation-zora.spec.js + code source appointment.routes.js

checks.query: SELECT status, validated_at FROM appointments WHERE patient_phone = '+242069735418' AND validated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT points, action_type, proof_class, proof_source FROM zora_ledger WHERE phone = '+242069735418' AND action_type = 'consultation' AND earned_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
checks.note: le montant de points depend du bareme zora_earn_rules, non verrouille en dur ici
